\tzpentry{ID3621}{Magnetization Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3621 introduces Magnetization Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} M(a) = \arg\max_{b} \left( \mathbf{g}_a \cdot \mathbf{c}_b \right). \end{equation}
